response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceeds the entry-level position, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and potential disengagement. His German language skill is minimal for a high on-site role in Berlin, and his focus on niche tech (DLang, custom tooling) may distract from pragmatic platform development.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js experience across multiple production systems
Proven full-stack ownership from API to UI with real-world scaling examples
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of devops/tooling (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Significantly overqualified for entry-level role; risk of turnover or misalignment
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
Overemphasis on experimental/DLang tools may detract from pragmatic platform priorities
